Read-only CLI over .derived/spec-registry/registry.json (specs/002-registry-consumer-mvp)

Usage: registry-consumer [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

Commands:
  list                     List features (human-readable table), sorted by id
  show                     Print one feature record as JSON
  status-report            Print lifecycle/status summary report
  show-relationships       Show outgoing and incoming relationships for a spec
  show-supersession-chain  Walk supersedes relationships back and forward from a spec
  show-constraints-on      Find specs with constrains: pointing at a target spec's target_specs
  by-authority             Output the authority set for a code path
  validate-graph           Validate the spec relationship graph for structural problems
  help                     Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
      --registry-path <PATH>  Path to registry.json (default: .derived/spec-registry/registry.json relative to cwd)
      --allow-invalid         Allow reading when validation.passed is false (diagnostics only)
  -h, --help                  Print help
  -V, --version               Print version
